H8400.derivation: from H1101 (בָּלַל) in the original sense of flowing;

H8401.strongs_def: properly, material, i.e. (specifically) refuse haum or stalks of grain (as chopped in threshing and used for fodder)

H8403.strongs_def: structure; by implication, a model, resemblance

H8404.strongs_def: Taberah, a place in the Desert

H8405.derivation: from the same as H948 (בּוּץ); whiteness;

H8407.derivation: or תִּגְלַת פְּלֶסֶר; or תִּלְגַּת פִּלְנְאֶסֶר or תִּלְגַּת פִּלְנֶסֶר; of foreign derivation;
H8407.strongs_def: Tiglath-Pileser or Tilgath-pilneser, an Assyryrian king

H8410.strongs_def: enduring; a species of hard-wood or lasting tree (perhaps oak)

H8411.derivation: (Aramaic) from H1753 (דּוּר) in the original sense of enduring;

H8412.derivation: or תַּמֹּר; (1 Kings 9:18), apparently from H8558 (תָּמָר); palm-city;

H8414.derivation: from an unused root meaning to lie waste;
H8414.strongs_def: a desolation (of surface), i.e. desert; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain
H8414.kjv_def: confusion, empty place, without form, nothing, (thing of) nought, vain, vanity, waste, wilderness.
H8414.usage: vain(4x), vanity(4x), confusion(3x), wilderness(2x), nought(2x), nothing(1x), waste(1x)

H8415.strongs_def: an abyss (as a surging mass of water), especially the deep (the main sea or the subterranean watersupply)

H8417.derivation: feminine of an unused noun (apparently from H1984 (הָלַל)) meaning bluster;

H8420.strongs_def: a mark; by implication, a signature

H8421.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7725 (שׁוּב), to come back;

H8422.derivation: or תֻּבַל; probably of foreign derivation;
H8422.strongs_def: Tubal, a postdiluvian patriarch and his posterity

H8423.derivation: apparently from H2986 (יָבַל) (compare H2981 (יְבוּל)) and H7014 (קַיִן); offspring of Cain;

H8425.derivation: or תֹּגַרְמָה; probably of foreign derivation;
H8425.strongs_def: Togarmah, a son of Gomer and his posterity

H8426.strongs_def: properly, an extension of the hand, i.e. (by implication) avowal, or (usually) adoration; specifically, a choir of worshippers

H8427.strongs_def: to mark out, i.e. (primitive) scratch or (definite) imprint

H8428.derivation: a primitive root (or perhaps identical with H8427 (תָּוָה) through a similar idea from scraping to pieces);

H8429.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8539 (תָּמַהּ) or perhaps to H7582 (שָׁאָה) through the idea of sweeping to ruin (compare H8428 (תָּוָה));
H8429.strongs_def: to amaze, i.e. (reflex. by implication) take alarm

H8430.derivation: from an unused root meaning to depress; humble;

H8432.derivation: from an unused root meaning to sever;
H8432.strongs_def: a bisection, i.e. (by implication) the centre
H8432.kjv_def: among(-st), [idiom] between, half, [idiom] (there-, where-), in(-to), middle, mid(-night), midst (among), [idiom] out (of), [idiom] through, [idiom] with(-in).
H8432.usage: midst(209x), among(140x), within(20x), middle(7x), in(6x), between(3x), therein(3x), through(2x), into(2x)

H8433.strongs_def: chastisement; figuratively (by words) correction, refutation, proof (even in defence)
H8433.kjv_def: argument, [idiom] chastened, correction, reasoning, rebuke, reproof, [idiom] be (often) reproved.

H8437.strongs_def: causing to howl, i.e. an oppressor

H8438.derivation: and (feminine) תּוֹלֵעָה; or תּוֹלַעַת; or תֹּלַעַת; from H3216 (יָלַע); a maggot (as voracious); specifically (often with ellipsis of H8144 (שָׁנִי))
H8438.strongs_def: the crimson-grub, but used only (in this connection) of the colorfrom it, and cloths dyed therewith

H8439.strongs_def: Tola, the name of two Israelites

H8440.strongs_def: a Tolaite (collectively) or descendants of Tola

H8441.derivation: or תֹּעֵבַה; feminine active participle of H8581 (תַּעָב);
H8441.strongs_def: properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol

H8443.strongs_def: (only in plural collective) weariness, i.e. (by implication) toil (treasure so obtained) or speed

H8444.strongs_def: (only in plural collective) exit, i.e. (geographical) boundary, or (figuratively) deliverance, (actively) source

H8445.derivation: from the same as H3349 (יִקָּהָה); obedience;

H8446.strongs_def: to meander (causatively, guide) about, especially fortrade or reconnoitring
H8446.kjv_def: chap(-man), sent to descry, be excellent, merchant(-man), search (out), seek, (e-) spy (out).

H8447.strongs_def: a succession, i.e. a string or (abstractly) order

H8448.strongs_def: a manner (as a sort of turn)

H8449.derivation: or תֹּר; probably the same as H8447 (תּוֹר);
H8449.strongs_def: a ring-dove, often (figuratively) as a term of endearment

H8451.strongs_def: a precept or statute, especially the Decalogue or Pentateuch

H8453.derivation: or תֹּשָׁב; (1 Kings 17:1), from H3427 (יָשַׁב); a dweller (but not outlandish (H5237 (נׇכְרִי))); especially (as distinguished from a native citizen (active participle of H3427 (יָשַׁב)) and a temporary inmate (H1616 (גֵּר)) or mere lodger (H3885 (לוּן)))

H8454.derivation: or תֻּשִׁיָּה; from an unused root probably meaning to substantiate;
H8454.strongs_def: support or (by implication) ability, i.e. (direct) help, (in purpose) an undertaking, (intellectual) understanding
H8454.kjv_def: enterprise, that which (thing as it) is, substance, (sound) wisdom, working.

H8455.derivation: from an unused root meaning to smite;

H8458.derivation: or תַּחְבּוּלָה; from H2254 (חָבַל) as denominative from H2256 (חֶבֶל);
H8458.strongs_def: (only in plural) properly, steerage (as a management of ropes), i.e. (figuratively) guidance or (by implication) a plan

H8459.derivation: from an unused root meaning to depress; abasement;

H8462.derivation: from H2490 (חָלַל) in the sense of opening;

H8464.strongs_def: a species of unclean bird (from its violence), perhaps an owl

H8465.strongs_def: Tachan, the name of two Israelites

H8470.strongs_def: a Tachanite (collectively) or descendants of Tachan

H8471.derivation: or תְּחַפְנְחֵס; (Ezekiel 30:18), or תַּחְפְּנֵס; (Jeremiah 2:16), of Egyptian derivation;
H8471.strongs_def: Tachpanches, Techaphneches or Tachpenes, a place in Egypt

H8473.derivation: from H2734 (חָרָה) in the original sense of H2352 (חוּר) or H2353 (חוּר);
H8473.strongs_def: a linen corslet (as white or hollow)

H8474.derivation: a facitious root from H2734 (חָרָה) through the idea of the heat of jealousy;

H8476.strongs_def: a (clean) animal with fur, probably a species of antelope

H8478.strongs_def: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
H8478.kjv_def: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.
H8478.pos: proper patrial adjective, accusative adverb, masculine noun

H8479.strongs_def: {the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.}

H8480.strongs_def: Tachath, the name of a place in the Desert, also of three Israelites
H8480.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H8482.strongs_def: lowermost; as noun (feminine plural) the depths (figuratively, a pit, the womb)

H8483.derivation: apparently from the plural masculine of H8482 (תַּחְתִּי) or H8478 (תַּחַת) and H2320 (חֹדֶשׁ); lower (ones) monthly;

H8485.derivation: or תֵּמָא; probably of foreign derivation;
H8485.strongs_def: Tema, a son of Ishmael, and the region settled by him
H8485.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H8486.strongs_def: the south (as being on the right hand of a person facing the east)

H8487.derivation: or תֵּמָן; the same as H8486 (תֵּימָן);
H8487.strongs_def: Teman, the name of two Edomites, and of the region and descendant of one of them
H8487.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H8489.strongs_def: a Temanite or descendant of Teman

H8490.derivation: or תִּמָרָה; from the same as H8558 (תָּמָר);

H8491.derivation: patrial or patronymically from an unused noun of uncertain meaning;
H8491.strongs_def: a Titsite or descendant or inhabitant of an unknown Tits

H8492.derivation: or תִּירֹשׁ; from H3423 (יָרַשׁ) in the sense of expulsion;
H8492.strongs_def: must or fresh grape-juice (as just squeezed out); by implication (rarely) fermented wine

H8495.derivation: from an unused root meaning to butt;
H8495.strongs_def: a buck or he-goat (as given to butting)

H8496.derivation: or תּוֹך; (Psalm 72:14), from the same base as H8432 (תָּוֶךְ) (in the sense of cutting to pieces);

H8498.strongs_def: adjustment, i.e. structure; by implication, equipage

H8499.derivation: from H3559 (כּוּן); or probably identical with H8498 (תְּכוּנָה);
H8499.strongs_def: something arranged or fixed, i.e. a place
